docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,720.00 FILED BY BONILLLA, EDUADO AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, KARLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, KARLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONILLLA, EDUADO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR, KARLA $1,720.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,760.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-25-1999, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONILLLA, EDUADO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SALAZAR, KARLA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
